name.x-prompt: What is the name of the migration? (kebab-case, e.g. rename-foo-target)

description.description: A description of what the migration does, shown by nx migrate

kind.description: The kind of migration: deterministic (a codemod), agentic (an AI-applied prompt for user-owned code), or hybrid (a codemod that does the mechanical part then hands off to an agent)

x-prompt.message: What kind of migration is this?

items.label: Deterministic — a codemod with an exact before/after (runs unattended, incl. CI)
Agentic — an AI-applied prompt for changes to user-owned code
Hybrid — a codemod for the mechanical part that hands off to an agent for the rest
